infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SnapTag needs access to your camera to take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SnapTag needs access to your microphone to record audio for videos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SnapTag needs access to your location to attach GPS coordinates to captured media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SnapTag needs access to your photo library to save captured photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SnapTag needs access to your photo library to save captured photos and videos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SnapTag to access the camera.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SnapTag to access the microphone.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow SnapTag to use your location.
